name: openclaw-skills (faahim)
description: A collection of 200+ utility skills for OpenClaw agents. Covers a wide range of automation tasks and workflows for everyday use.
review: Comprehensive collection of 200+ utility skills for OpenClaw agents by an established author (GitHub since 2016). Covers a broad range of automation use cases. Conditional: needs formal LICENSE file and catalog organization strategy.
catalog_note: 200+ skills collection. License pending. Use individual skills as needed.
